objectives: Use ten Safety Basic terms accurately.

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for electric shock hazard evaluation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含觸電危害評估的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of energy hazard evaluation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明能量危害評估。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for fire enclosure evaluation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了防火外殼評估的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how mechanical hazard evaluation will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄機械危害評估。

vocabulary.example: The project team discussed normal condition evaluation during the pre-test meeting.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了正常狀態評估。

vocabulary.example: The assessor reviewed the traceable evidence supporting single fault condition evaluation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 評鑑人員審查了支持單一故障狀態評估的可追溯證據。

vocabulary.example: The investigation separated observations about safeguard evaluation from working hypotheses.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 調查將防護措施評估的觀察結果與待驗證假設分開記錄。

vocabulary.example: The engineer explained why accessible part evaluation was relevant to the compliance decision.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師說明了可觸及部件評估與符合性判定的關聯。

vocabulary.zh_tw: 危害導向安全工程評估
vocabulary.example: The technician verified hazard-based safety engineering evaluation before connecting the sample.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術員在連接樣品前確認了危害導向安全工程評估。

vocabulary.example: The team evaluated the technical risk related to risk assessment evaluation.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊評估了與風險評估評估相關的技術風險。

common_sentences.english: I will explain how fire enclosure evaluation affects compliance.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我會說明防火外殼評估如何影響符合性。

common_sentences.english: Our review found no abnormality in mechanical hazard evaluation.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們的審查未發現機械危害評估有異常。

common_sentences.english: Can you confirm the acceptance criterion for normal condition evaluation?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 你可以確認正常狀態評估的接受準則嗎？

common_sentences.english: We isolated single fault condition evaluation as the dominant factor.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們已確認單一故障狀態評估是主要影響因素。

common_sentences.english: The customer requested a concise update on safeguard evaluation.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 客戶要求提供防護措施評估的精簡進度說明。

dialogue.context_zh_tw: 產品安全基礎測試前審查

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified electric shock hazard evaluation and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認觸電危害評估並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for energy hazard evaluation?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對能量危害評估的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: EFT fail — Safety Basic investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 快速暫態脈衝群測試失敗：產品安全基礎調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 052 shows a repeatable eft fail condition.
debug_case.background: The Safety Basic configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: Burst energy couples through the power input.
I/O filtering is located too far from the connector.
check_steps: Confirm clamp position and coupling length.
Monitor supply rails and communication errors.
corrective_actions: Move filtering to the entry point.
Improve decoupling and cable shielding termination.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Safety Basic design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Safety Basic.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「產品安全基礎」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Safety Basic, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「electric shock hazard evaluation」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
options: 危害導向安全工程評估
quiz.explanation: electric shock hazard evaluation 指的是「觸電危害評估」。

quiz.prompt: 「能量危害評估」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 energy hazard evaluation。

quiz.prompt: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for ________.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 程序定義了防火外殼評估的接受準則。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 fire enclosure evaluation。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 mechanical hazard evaluation（機械危害評估）。

quiz.prompt: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Safety Basic.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「產品安全基礎」。
quiz.answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Safety Basic, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
